description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical white candle set in an ornate, metallic candlestick holder. The candle is unlit, with a visible wick protruding from the top and a smooth, clean surface free of wax drips. The holder is made of what appears to be aged brass or bronze, featuring a wide, faceted base for stability, a slender, turned stem, and a broad, shallow dish to catch any potential wax drips. The metallic surface has a matte, slightly weathered finish, giving it an antique appearance. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for both decorative and practical lighting purposes. The proportions suggest it is intended for placement on a table or similar elevated surface in an urban environment.
description: A tall white candle sits in an ornate, antique-style brass candlestick holder with a wide, faceted base and a smooth, unlit surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the white candle and the symmetrical, faceted brass holder with a wide base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cylindrical candle and the angular facets of the holder's base, with the wick slightly angled.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the even proportions and the clean, upright candle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the candle's wick and the holder's detailed stem and base from a different angle.
